chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome back to Computer Course Class 5.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Does your mind wander while searching for files in your computer?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Sometimes you feel that the file was here and now it is missing.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, the problem is not yours,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the problem is not using File Explorer with full power.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In today's video, I am going to teach you

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the A to Z power of File Explorer in easy language,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: step by step, with zero confusion.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What is File Explorer? How to open it?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Folders, Files, Zip, Copy Path, View, Navigation

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: and all those professional tricks which are useful in office, college and corporate life every day.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So if you want fast work, proper file management and full control on the computer,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: then watch the video till the end.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Because after today, you will never find File Explorer confusing.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And yes, if you like this video, then don't forget to like and subscribe.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And press the bell icon so that you don't miss the next video and other courses.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So let's start without wasting time.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: File Explorer is a place where all the documents, photos, videos and software files of your computer are.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Just like there is a closet in the house, there are folders in the same File Explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Where you keep things, i.e. files.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the old Windows, it was also called Windows Explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are many ways to open File Explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This PC on the desktop or it may be written My Computer on your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Double click on it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the File Explorer icon given in the taskbar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or type File Explorer in the search box.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then press Enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: My favorite is shortcut.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press Windows plus E on your keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: File Explorer will open.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After opening File Explorer, you will see something like this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It may look a little confusing at first, but don't worry.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now I will explain everything in its simple language.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's understand its layout.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Above all, this strip is called Ribbon Menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here are Home, Share and View tabs.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Navigation is shown on the left side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the map of your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you can see Quick Access, This PC and all your trials.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is an address bar under the ribbon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It tells you where you are in the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And this is the big area in the middle.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is your main content area.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Where you can see files and folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to the real power, Ribbon Menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, the most powerful thing in File Explorer is Ribbon Menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you open File Explorer, you get a Home tab open as default.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are all the options in the Home tab, which you use daily with the file and folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, if there is a folder that you open every day,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like Documents, Projects, Office Files.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then why waste time in looking for it again and again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is what PIN to Quick Access does.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now how to pin a folder to PIN to Quick Access?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the folder you want to join to Quick Access.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on PIN to Quick Access in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now that folder will always be visible in Quick Access on the left side.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now adding is done.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now it is also necessary to remove.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how to remove.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click on the folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Unpin from Quick Access.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The folder will be unpin from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From here you can cut, copy or paste any file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Do not get confused in cut and copy.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Copy means making a copy of the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, the original file should remain in its place and its new copy should go to another place.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First select the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Copy in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or use the shortcut Ctrl C.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now go to the folder you want to copy.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then click on Paste from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or use the shortcut Ctrl V.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your file is present in two places.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's know about cut.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Cut means removing the file or folder from one place and taking it to another place.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To cut, select the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Cut in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or use the shortcut Ctrl X.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Go to the new location where you want to paste.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Paste there or use the shortcut Ctrl V.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the file has moved from the old place to a new place.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is simple, remember.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Copy means making a duplicate file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And cut means moving.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, taking it from one place to another.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Right click on the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From this pop-up menu, you can open, cut, copy, paste, rename and delete.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to a professional feature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is mostly used in corporate offices, IT companies and data management.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the option of Copy Path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First, let's know what is a path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Path means the entire address of the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, where is it kept in the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As we can see the path in the address bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like we are in this PC, Document, Office File, Reports.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is our path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to copy the path?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the Copy Path in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now the entire path of that file or folder has been copied in the clipboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I paste it in the search box below.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See, its entire path has been copied with the folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or you can click on the path in the address bar and select it and press Ctrl C.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The path is copied from here too.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can paste it in the email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can send it in WhatsApp or Teams Outlook.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are a lot of files in corporate or office environments.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There are share drives, there is teamwork.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In this, instead of sending files, it is more professional to send the path of the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So by keeping the file in the share drive, you can copy that path and send it to your colleague.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you can say that the file will be found on this path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This saves time, less confusion, professional communication.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now your colleague will copy that path and paste it in the address bar of the file explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you enter, it will directly reach the same path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or if you paste that path in the search box here and enter, it will directly reach the same path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to organize your file properly, then it is very important to make a folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How to make a new folder?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the New Folder in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Write its name as soon as you make a folder and press Enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is also a shortcut for this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press Ctrl, Shift and N directly from the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And a new folder will be created immediately.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Most people think that we can only make a new folder in File Explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: But in fact, you can make a lot of things from new items.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the Home tab, you will find a New Item here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you click on New Item, you get this option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Creating a new folder, creating a new text document, Microsoft Word Document and Excel Sheet.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As soon as you select an item, it is immediately created.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you can give its name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Daily Reports, Data Entry File, Instructions or Notes in the Office.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: New Item is used a lot for all of these.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will right click on the empty space in our folder and go to New from the pop-up menu.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you can see here that you can create a new item from here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whether it is Excel, Word, Document or Folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to a very important and professional feature.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Properties.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: What are properties?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Properties show you the complete information of any file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To see properties, select a file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on Properties in the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or right click and then click on Properties.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the General tab of Properties, you will get the name of the file or folder, location, size, created date, modified date, etc.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Properties are very useful in the office environment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you want to check how big the file is, when the file was made, who and when was the last modified.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before email, you have to confirm the file size.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Properties are used in IT, HR, Data Entry and Admin jobs.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's know how to delete a file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When a file or folder is not useful, it should be deleted.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you make more files for the same work, then there can be a little confusion later.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which is the final file, which is useful, then it is better to delete the file that is not useful.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how to delete.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the file, delete it from the Home tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or press the delete key from the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The deleted file goes straight to the Recycle Bin, from where it can be brought back if needed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We will learn about Recycle Bin in detail in the next video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn how to rename a file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Many times the name of the file is not going to be understood or misunderstood, so we rename it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To rename, select the file or folder, click on the Rename in the Home tab, write a new name and press Enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is also a shortcut key for this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the file, then press the F2 key and type the name and press Enter.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or select that file with the mouse and then click on that file again after 2-3 seconds.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can also rename the file with this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's learn how to select one file or many files.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Before doing any work in the computer, like copy, cut, delete or move,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: the most important thing is to select the file or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If we click left once on any file or folder with the mouse, it is selected.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now if we want to select multiple files or folders, then press the Ctrl key on the keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now click left on the files or folders that you want to select one by one.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can see that multiple files are selected like this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to select all the files from one file to another, then what will you do?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The first way is to click left on the first file, now press the Shift key and click left on the last file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can see that all the files between the first and last file have been selected.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And the second way is by dragging with the mouse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Press and hold the left click with the mouse, drag the cursor to the file you want to select.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if we want to select all the files or folders in this folder, then go to the Home tab and click on Select All.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or use the shortcut key Ctrl A.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can copy, cut, move or delete the selected file or folder without any problem.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the Share tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, in File Explorer, the Share tab is used mainly to share, make a zip and prepare for email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: When you select a file or folder and click on the Share tab above, you will see many useful options.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the zip option, the most important feature of the Share tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about what is zip?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Zip means to reduce the size of the file or folder so that it can be easily shared or sent.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: After zipping, the size of the file decreases, multiple files come in the same zip file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It becomes easier to send on email and WhatsApp.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how to make a zip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Select the file or folder you want to zip, click on the Share tab above, then click on Zip.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: A .zip file will be created at the same location, you can change its name.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to email many files, then attaching them one by one is not a professional method.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The right way is to select all the files, convert them into a zip file and then attach only one zip file to the email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Email looks clean and professional.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is easy for the receiver to manage the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Zip file takes less space.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: IT, HR, Accountant, Admin, Zip is used everywhere.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the next video, we will learn how to write a professional email and how to compose it.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You have learned how to make a zip file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's learn how to make a zip file normal again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To open a zip file, right click on the zip file, then click on the extract here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file will return to the normal folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The second useful option of the share tab is to share via email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The option to attach the file directly to the email.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Share with people and device.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To share files with a network or nearby device.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And here is the option to print.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: To print the selected file directly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's come to the web tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, the web tab in file explorer is how to view files and folders or decide.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, you control from the view tab that in what size, in what style and with how much detail you can see.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The first thing that comes in the view tab is the layout group.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: From where you can change the view of the file and folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the option of extra large icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file is visible in very large icons.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is the best option to view photos and images.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then there is a large option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The icons are a little small but clear.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The option is good for normal daily use.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Medium small icon.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: More files are visible on the same screen when the number of files is very high.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: List view.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file is visible as a simple list.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is helpful for fast scanning and quick search.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the option of detail view.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The file name, type, size, date, everything is visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is used most in office and corporate work.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's learn how to keep the file in the right order.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This option is short by.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Short means to put the file in one order.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to see the largest file first, then click on the size column.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can see that the largest file has come first.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you click on the same size again, the order will change.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you will see a small size file first.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the biggest advantage of detail view.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Because you can see the name, size, date, all columns.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can click here and sort the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the name and according to the name, according to the size,

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: according to the date, according to the type and author.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It makes it very easy and fast to find the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You get very useful checkboxes in the view tab.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you can see the file name extension.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It shows the full name of the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like report.docs, data.xls, gistguru.gwg.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Which software extension do you have from here?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to know what is the extension of AutoCAD and what is the extension of Word.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By turning it on, you will see the extension after the name of the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is very important in the office and IT field.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So that you can identify the correct file type.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now come to hidden items.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It is useful in advanced users and turbo shooting.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Navigation is worn here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The folder panel on the left side helps you to navigate quickly in files and drives.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then here is the preview.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It shows the preview without opening the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It saves time in checking documents and images.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, in the top left corner of the file explorer, you can see these three very important navigation buttons.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Back, Forward and Up.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The work of these buttons is to navigate between files and folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here is the back button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: With this, you can go back to the previous location or folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Let's see how.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like we were in this PC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then we went to the document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Opened the folder of the office file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now if you press the back button, then you will go back in the order of office file, document, this PC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or it works like the back button of the browser.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or it is the forward button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you have come back from the back button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And now you want to go to the next location.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So use the forward button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You pressed back and returned to the document.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you have to go back to the office folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you want to go to the office folder, then press the forward button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And you will return to the same folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Back and forward, both buttons work opposite to each other.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can see a small down arrow near the forward button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This is the recent location button.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on it, you can see the list of recently visited locations.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like this PC, document, office file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Whatever you have opened recently.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can click on any of this list and reach there directly.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This feature is useful when you have to go to the recent folder again and again.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or the up to button is.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Up arrow takes you from the current folder to a level above the folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you are in this path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This PC, document, office file, report.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By pressing the up arrow, you will reach the office type.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Back arrow and up to arrow work almost the same.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So don't get confused in this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Back arrow takes you to the previous location.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Up to arrow takes you from the current folder to a level above the folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can also go back and forth by using the address bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: In the address bar, you can clearly see which folder you are in.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If I am in this path.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This PC, document, office file, report.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And I have to go back.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So I can go straight by clicking on the office files in the address bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or I can go straight by clicking on this PC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: There is a refresh button next to the address bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on it, your current open folder is refreshed.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can see the search box on the right side of the address bar.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By using this, you can search any file or folder present in the current folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: As I am writing in the search box, by pressing the enter key from the GISTeguru keyboard.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: All the files and folders with similar names will be shown on the screen in this folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now you can go to the location directly by clicking on the file or folder you need.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This feature is also useful when there are a lot of files in the folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the navigation pane.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Navigation pane is always shown on the left side in the file explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: It helps you to quickly reach all the drives, folders and quick access locations of the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, you can make it easy and fast to move around in the file explorer with the navigation pane.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: First of all, there is quick access here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: That is, whatever file you have opened or visited in the folder, you can see it here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can access it with just one click.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How do you pin your favorite folder here?

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We have learned that in the video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Click on the small arrow icon next to the folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The folder will expand and all the folders will be visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then you can click on the same arrow and collapse.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: This keeps the file explorer organized and the scrolling is less.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or the PC option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: By clicking on this PC, you can see all the main locations and drives of the computer at the same place.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Here you get these important folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Desktop, Documents, Download, Pictures.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: All the drives are also visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like C drive or you have made more than one drive here.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So it will also be visible.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you connect any external drive to the computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like pen drive, external hard disk, memory card.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So it is also visible automatically in this PC.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can open the file by clicking on the external drive.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: You can copy and paste.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or the network option.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If your computer is connected to an office or home network.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then you can access connected devices and share folders from the network pane.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or the big area or content area.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: We have learned about this.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Now let's talk about the status bar at the bottom of the file explorer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or in the status bar, it gives us a quick information about the current folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Like how many files or folders are in that folder.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: How many files have been selected now.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And what is the size of the selected files.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: The status bar is very useful in office or daily use.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Because we can see its basic information immediately without opening the file.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Friends, that's all in today's video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: I hope you liked this video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And now you can confidently manage your files and folders.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: If you found this video helpful.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Then do like.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: And if you are new to the channel, then don't forget to subscribe.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So that you don't miss the next video and course updates.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Tell in the comment which feature you found most useful.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Or if you have any suggestions, then comment.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: So friends, now you are a master on your computer.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: See you in the next video.

chunks.title: Class
chunks.text: Till then keep practicing.

text: Hello friends, welcome back to Computer Course Class 5. Does your mind wander while searching for files in your computer? Sometimes you feel that the file was here and now it is missing. So friends, the problem is not yours, the problem is not using File Explorer with full power. In today's video, I am going to teach you the A to Z power of File Explorer in easy language, step by step, with zero confusion. What is File Explorer? How to open it? Folders, Files, Zip, Copy Path, View, Navigation and all those professional tricks which are useful in office, college and corporate life every day. So if you want fast work, proper file management and full control on the computer, then watch the video till the end. Because after today, you will never find File Explorer confusing. And yes, if you like this video, then don't forget to like and subscribe. And press the bell icon so that you don't miss the next video and other courses. So let's start without wasting time. File Explorer is a place where all the documents, photos, videos and software files of your computer are. Just like there is a closet in the house, there are folders in the same File Explorer. Where you keep things, i.e. files. In the old Windows, it was also called Windows Explorer. There are many ways to open File Explorer. This PC on the desktop or it may be written My Computer on your computer. Double click on it. Click on the File Explorer icon given in the taskbar. Or type File Explorer in the search box. Then press Enter. My favorite is shortcut. Press Windows plus E on your keyboard. File Explorer will open. After opening File Explorer, you will see something like this. It may look a little confusing at first, but don't worry. Now I will explain everything in its simple language. Now let's understand its layout. Above all, this strip is called Ribbon Menu. Here are Home, Share and View tabs. Navigation is shown on the left side. This is the map of your computer. Here you can see Quick Access, This PC and all your trials. There is an address bar under the ribbon. It tells you where you are in the computer. And this is the big area in the middle. This is your main content area. Where you can see files and folders. Now let's come to the real power, Ribbon Menu. Friends, the most powerful thing in File Explorer is Ribbon Menu. As soon as you open File Explorer, you get a Home tab open as default. There are all the options in the Home tab, which you use daily with the file and folder. Friends, if there is a folder that you open every day, Like Documents, Projects, Office Files. Then why waste time in looking for it again and again. This is what PIN to Quick Access does. Now how to pin a folder to PIN to Quick Access? Let's learn. Select the folder you want to join to Quick Access. Click on PIN to Quick Access in the Home tab. Now that folder will always be visible in Quick Access on the left side. Now adding is done. Now it is also necessary to remove. Let's see how to remove. Right click on the folder. Click on Unpin from Quick Access. The folder will be unpin from here. From here you can cut, copy or paste any file or folder. Do not get confused in cut and copy. Copy means making a copy of the file or folder. That is, the original file should remain in its place and its new copy should go to another place. First select the file or folder. Click on Copy in the Home tab. Or use the shortcut Ctrl C. Now go to the folder you want to copy. Then click on Paste from here. Or use the shortcut Ctrl V. Now your file is present in two places. Now let's know about cut. Cut means removing the file or folder from one place and taking it to another place. To cut, select the file or folder. Click on Cut in the Home tab. Or use the shortcut Ctrl X. Go to the new location where you want to paste. Click on Paste there or use the shortcut Ctrl V. Now the file has moved from the old place to a new place. It is simple, remember. Copy means making a duplicate file. And cut means moving. That is, taking it from one place to another. Right click on the file or folder. From this pop-up menu, you can open, cut, copy, paste, rename and delete. Now let's come to a professional feature. This is mostly used in corporate offices, IT companies and data management. Here is the option of Copy Path. First, let's know what is a path. Path means the entire address of the file or folder. That is, where is it kept in the computer. As we can see the path in the address bar. Like we are in this PC, Document, Office File, Reports. This is our path. How to copy the path? Select the file or folder. Click on the Copy Path in the Home tab. Now the entire path of that file or folder has been copied in the clipboard. I paste it in the search box below. See, its entire path has been copied with the folder. Or you can click on the path in the address bar and select it and press Ctrl C. The path is copied from here too. Now you can paste it in the email. You can send it in WhatsApp or Teams Outlook. There are a lot of files in corporate or office environments. There are share drives, there is teamwork. In this, instead of sending files, it is more professional to send the path of the file. So by keeping the file in the share drive, you can copy that path and send it to your colleague. And you can say that the file will be found on this path. This saves time, less confusion, professional communication. Now your colleague will copy that path and paste it in the address bar of the file explorer. If you enter, it will directly reach the same path. Or if you paste that path in the search box here and enter, it will directly reach the same path. If you want to organize your file properly, then it is very important to make a folder. How to make a new folder? Let's learn. Click on the New Folder in the Home tab. Write its name as soon as you make a folder and press Enter. There is also a shortcut for this. Press Ctrl, Shift and N directly from the keyboard. And a new folder will be created immediately. Most people think that we can only make a new folder in File Explorer. But in fact, you can make a lot of things from new items. In the Home tab, you will find a New Item here. When you click on New Item, you get this option. Creating a new folder, creating a new text document, Microsoft Word Document and Excel Sheet. As soon as you select an item, it is immediately created. And you can give its name. Daily Reports, Data Entry File, Instructions or Notes in the Office. New Item is used a lot for all of these. We will right click on the empty space in our folder and go to New from the pop-up menu. And you can see here that you can create a new item from here. Whether it is Excel, Word, Document or Folder. Now let's come to a very important and professional feature. Properties. What are properties? Properties show you the complete information of any file or folder. To see properties, select a file or folder. Click on Properties in the Home tab. Or right click and then click on Properties. In the General tab of Properties, you will get the name of the file or folder, location, size, created date, modified date, etc. Properties are very useful in the office environment. When you want to check how big the file is, when the file was made, who and when was the last modified. Before email, you have to confirm the file size. Properties are used in IT, HR, Data Entry and Admin jobs. Now let's know how to delete a file. When a file or folder is not useful, it should be deleted. If you make more files for the same work, then there can be a little confusion later. Which is the final file, which is useful, then it is better to delete the file that is not useful. Let's see how to delete. Select the file, delete it from the Home tab. Or press the delete key from the keyboard. The deleted file goes straight to the Recycle Bin, from where it can be brought back if needed. We will learn about Recycle Bin in detail in the next video. Let's learn how to rename a file or folder. Many times the name of the file is not going to be understood or misunderstood, so we rename it. To rename, select the file or folder, click on the Rename in the Home tab, write a new name and press Enter. There is also a shortcut key for this. Select the file, then press the F2 key and type the name and press Enter. Or select that file with the mouse and then click on that file again after 2-3 seconds. You can also rename the file with this. Let's learn how to select one file or many files. Before doing any work in the computer, like copy, cut, delete or move, the most important thing is to select the file or folder. If we click left once on any file or folder with the mouse, it is selected. Now if we want to select multiple files or folders, then press the Ctrl key on the keyboard. Now click left on the files or folders that you want to select one by one. You can see that multiple files are selected like this. If you want to select all the files from one file to another, then what will you do? The first way is to click left on the first file, now press the Shift key and click left on the last file. Now you can see that all the files between the first and last file have been selected. And the second way is by dragging with the mouse. Press and hold the left click with the mouse, drag the cursor to the file you want to select. And if we want to select all the files or folders in this folder, then go to the Home tab and click on Select All. Or use the shortcut key Ctrl A. Now you can copy, cut, move or delete the selected file or folder without any problem. Now let's talk about the Share tab. Friends, in File Explorer, the Share tab is used mainly to share, make a zip and prepare for email. When you select a file or folder and click on the Share tab above, you will see many useful options. This is the zip option, the most important feature of the Share tab. Now let's talk about what is zip? Zip means to reduce the size of the file or folder so that it can be easily shared or sent. After zipping, the size of the file decreases, multiple files come in the same zip file. It becomes easier to send on email and WhatsApp. Let's see how to make a zip. Select the file or folder you want to zip, click on the Share tab above, then click on Zip. A .zip file will be created at the same location, you can change its name. If you want to email many files, then attaching them one by one is not a professional method. The right way is to select all the files, convert them into a zip file and then attach only one zip file to the email. Email looks clean and professional. It is easy for the receiver to manage the file. Zip file takes less space. IT, HR, Accountant, Admin, Zip is used everywhere. In the next video, we will learn how to write a professional email and how to compose it. You have learned how to make a zip file. Now let's learn how to make a zip file normal again. To open a zip file, right click on the zip file, then click on the extract here. The file will return to the normal folder. The second useful option of the share tab is to share via email. The option to attach the file directly to the email. Share with people and device. To share files with a network or nearby device. And here is the option to print. To print the selected file directly. Now let's come to the web tab. Friends, the web tab in file explorer is how to view files and folders or decide. That is, you control from the view tab that in what size, in what style and with how much detail you can see. The first thing that comes in the view tab is the layout group. From where you can change the view of the file and folder. Here is the option of extra large icon. The file is visible in very large icons. It is the best option to view photos and images. Then there is a large option. The icons are a little small but clear. The option is good for normal daily use. Medium small icon. More files are visible on the same screen when the number of files is very high. List view. The file is visible as a simple list. It is helpful for fast scanning and quick search. This is the option of detail view. The file name, type, size, date, everything is visible. It is used most in office and corporate work. Now let's learn how to keep the file in the right order. This option is short by. Short means to put the file in one order. If you want to see the largest file first, then click on the size column. Now you can see that the largest file has come first. If you click on the same size again, the order will change. And you will see a small size file first. This is the biggest advantage of detail view. Because you can see the name, size, date, all columns. You can click here and sort the file. Click on the name and according to the name, according to the size, according to the date, according to the type and author. It makes it very easy and fast to find the file. You get very useful checkboxes in the view tab. Here you can see the file name extension. It shows the full name of the file. Like report.docs, data.xls, gistguru.gwg. Which software extension do you have from here? If you want to know what is the extension of AutoCAD and what is the extension of Word. By turning it on, you will see the extension after the name of the file. This is very important in the office and IT field. So that you can identify the correct file type. Now come to hidden items.
